### 💬 Support Case Response

**Ticket ID:**  
e.g., Zendesk #12345 or Intercom #67890

**Customer Impact:**  
Describe the severity and user type

**Root Cause:**  
What was failing or misunderstood?

**Fix Summary:**
- [ ] Bug fixed
- [ ] UX clarified
- [ ] Docs updated

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Support case linked
- [ ] QA verified fix
- [ ] Success team notified
